expectations.text: Uses the prior conversation as context instead of restarting requirement discovery from scratch
expectations.evidence: It continues from '第一版这三类审批' and asks whether they are fixed single-level approvals or need conditional routing, so it does use the prior conversation as context.

expectations.text: Provides a pre-generation review that separates confirmed points from unresolved or risky items
expectations.evidence: It does not provide any confirmed-vs-unresolved review; it jumps straight to another follow-up question.

expectations.text: Asks explicitly whether to begin final downstream-prompt generation instead of generating immediately after '差不多了'
expectations.evidence: It does not ask for permission to begin final generation after '差不多了'; it continues clarification instead.

eval_feedback.overall: This eval is now strong enough to expose the target late-stage behavior, but baseline and with-skill currently fail the same way.
